title: Smelt Touch
description: A smelting enchantment for your Minecraft tools!
body:
![GitHub last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/BananaPuppyBruh/SmeltTouch?style=for-the-badge&logo=github) ![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/smelt-touch?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth) # Smelt Touch Adds the enchantment **Smelt Touch** for minecraft tools.
When it is applied, drops from blocks mined are automagically smelted!
Modded furnace recipes and digging tools should be supported!
### Feature Requests & Issues [GitHub Issue Tracker](https://github.com/BananaPuppyBruh/SmeltTouch/issues)
